---
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(reactable)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

options(box.path = here::here())

box::use(tablas = data / mocked / matriz[balances = balance_matriz, diferencias])
```

```{r}
tablas$balance_matriz |>
  reactable()
```
